wet scrubber for 735 cfm 700mm tower 1 n.spec_writeup:
## Wet Scrubber — Recommended Specification

**Customer Requirements**
- ✓ Air volume cfm: 735
- ✓ Air volume cmh: 1250
- ✓ Tower diameter (mm): 700
- ✓ Qty: 1

**Engineering Assessment**
- Requirement completeness: 100%
- Historical support: 5 ATS project(s)
- Applicable engineering rules: 4
- Validation checks flagged: 0
- Missing inputs: None

**Recommended specification (per unit)**
- **Air volume cfm:** 735 — Client requirement (authoritative).
- **Air volume cmh:** 1250 — Client requirement (authoritative).
- **Tower diameter (mm):** 700 — Client requirement (authoritative).
- **Tower height (m):** 3.5 — 5 x tower diameter 700 mm (gas-liquid contact height) (ATS spray-tower height standard).
- **Scrubber chamber:** SS-304 2mm — Observed in 3 of 5 comparable projects (historical consensus).
- **Scrubber tank:** SS-304 2mm — Reused from nearest design OFF-C2C-WS-178 (exact airflow match).
- **No. of towers:** 1 — Reused from nearest design OFF-C2C-WS-178 (exact airflow match).
- **Spray nozzles (nos):** 17 — recirculation L/G 5.0 L/m3 x 1250 m3/h = 104 L/min, / 6 L/min per nozzle (ATS wet-scrubber spray-coverage standard).
- **Spray nozzle material:** SS-304 — Reused from nearest design OFF-C2C-WS-178 (exact airflow match).
- **Pump capacity (HP):** 1 — P = rho.g.Q.H / eff with Q 104 L/min, H 25 m, eff 0.6 (Hydraulic pump-power formula); calculated 0.95, selected nearest standard 1.
- **Pump make:** ANALA — Observed in 5 of 5 comparable projects (historical consensus).
- **Eliminator / demister:** PP 650mm dia x 150mm thick — Reused from nearest design OFF-C2C-WS-178 (exact airflow match).
- **Tank capacity (litre):** 250 — 104 L/min x 2.5 min retention (ATS recirculation-tank standard); calculated 260.42, selected nearest standard 250.
- **Blower type:** centrifugal — Observed in 5 of 5 comparable projects (historical consensus).
- **Blower static pressure mmwc:** 200 — Reused from nearest design OFF-C2C-WS-178 (exact airflow match).
- **Blower motor hp:** 2 — Reused from nearest design OFF-C2C-WS-178 (exact airflow match).
- **Finish:** SS scrubber 2b; MS - epoxy primer and epoxy top coat — Reused from nearest design OFF-C2C-WS-178 (exact airflow match).

**Engineering checks**
- ✓ Gas velocity 0.90 m/s is within the design range (0.7-1.5 m/s) for the 700 mm tower.
- • Operating temperature not given - ambient assumed. A hot gas stream would need pre-cooling and a material/finish review.
- • Operating pressure / available draft not given - confirm the blower static pressure against the scrubber pressure drop.

**Basis & confidence**
Based primarily on historical project **OFF-C2C-WS-178** — the closest comparable wet scrubber on file. Client-requirement values come straight from your input; others are computed by engineering rules or reused from that project. With limited comparable projects on file, treat this as a starting point for engineering review.

- Requirement completeness: 100% (3/3 inputs)
- Historical evidence: 100% (5 project(s))
- Rule coverage: 59% (10/17 decisions)
- Validation: 100%

**Overall confidence: 90% (High).** Missing inputs: Operating temperature, Operating pressure.

_Provenance: 17 decisions — 3 client requirement, 4 engineering rule, 3 historical consensus, 7 reused from historical offer. Every value is traceable to its source (see decision ledger)._

_Source: C2C _Sika _Jaipur_R2 240523.pdf_
technical: SS scrubber 2b; MS - epoxy primer and epoxy top coat

wet scrubber for 3000 cfm 1000mm tower 2.spec_writeup:
## Wet Scrubber — Recommended Specification

**Customer Requirements**
- ✓ Air volume cfm: 3000
- ✓ Air volume cmh: 5097
- ✓ Tower diameter (mm): 1000
- ✓ Qty: 2

**Engineering Assessment**
- Requirement completeness: 100%
- Historical support: 5 ATS project(s)
- Applicable engineering rules: 4
- Validation checks flagged: 1
- Missing inputs: None

> **Quantity:** 2 complete wet scrubber units are required. The specification below is **per unit** — each unit has its own tower, pump, spray nozzles and tank as listed.

**Recommended specification (per unit)**
- **Air volume cmh:** 5097 — Client requirement (authoritative).
- **Tower diameter (mm):** 1000 — Client requirement (authoritative).
- **Tower height (m):** 5 — 5 x tower diameter 1000 mm (gas-liquid contact height) (ATS spray-tower height standard).
- **Scrubber chamber:** 10mm (5mm PP + 5mm FRP lining) — Reused from nearest design OFF-MECCA-WS-164.
- **No. of towers:** 2 — Reused from nearest design OFF-MECCA-WS-164.
- **Spray nozzles (nos):** 71 — recirculation L/G 5.0 L/m3 x 5097 m3/h = 425 L/min, / 6 L/min per nozzle (ATS wet-scrubber spray-coverage standard).
- **Spray nozzle material:** PP — Reused from nearest design OFF-MECCA-WS-164.
- **Pump capacity (HP):** 3 — P = rho.g.Q.H / eff with Q 425 L/min, H 25 m, eff 0.6 (Hydraulic pump-power formula); calculated 3.88, selected nearest standard 3.
- **Pump make:** ANALA — Observed in 5 of 5 comparable projects (historical consensus).
- **Packing:** PP pall rings — Reused from nearest design OFF-MECCA-WS-164.
- **Eliminator / demister:** PP mist eliminator / pall rings — Reused from nearest design OFF-MECCA-WS-164.
- **Blower type:** centrifugal — Observed in 5 of 5 comparable projects (historical consensus).
- **Blower motor hp:** 12.5 — Reused from nearest design OFF-MECCA-WS-164.
- **Blower moc:** PP + FRP — Reused from nearest design OFF-MECCA-WS-164.
- **Ph controller:** Mepcco PhM 600-1 — Reused from nearest design OFF-MECCA-WS-164.

**Engineering checks**
- ⚠ Gas velocity is 1.80 m/s - above ~1.5 m/s, so droplet carry-over is likely. Consider a larger tower (about 1343 mm) or a higher-efficiency demister.
- • Operating temperature not given - ambient assumed. A hot gas stream would need pre-cooling and a material/finish review.
- • Operating pressure / available draft not given - confirm the blower static pressure against the scrubber pressure drop.
- • 8 component(s) were reused from OFF-MECCA-WS-164 (a 6100 m3/h design) for a 5097 m3/h duty - confirm they still suit the new airflow.

**Basis & confidence**
Based primarily on historical project **OFF-MECCA-WS-164** — the closest comparable wet scrubber on file. Client-requirement values come straight from your input; others are computed by engineering rules or reused from that project. With limited comparable projects on file, treat this as a starting point for engineering review.

- Requirement completeness: 100% (3/3 inputs)
- Historical evidence: 100% (5 project(s))
- Rule coverage: 47% (7/15 decisions)
- Validation: 75%

**Overall confidence: 83% (High).** Missing inputs: Operating temperature, Operating pressure. 1 engineering check(s) flagged - see Engineering checks.
